holdings.infoBox: ILCV is an equity ETF with a total of 386 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 6.55%, Microsoft at 4.81%, Berkshire Hathaway at 2.76%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.65%, and Amazon.com at 2.30%.

overview.description: The iShares Morningstar Value ETF (ILCV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of value stocks, selected from the top 90% of the US market-cap spectrum. ILCV was launched on Jun 28, 2004 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Morningstar US Large-Mid Cap Broad Value Index
